data.body:
Executed the FOUNDATION epic "Workflow authoring v2: contract-bearing prompt/step model + editor authoring" (alias rub-hope-smear, da27-c916-f04e-4885) end to end, plus a code review and review-driven follow-ups.

WHAT SHIPPED (branch epic/workflow-authoring-v2-foundation → PR #8, draft→ready, auto-merge squash enabled):
- All 11 child stories closed: 5e78 walking skeleton (contract-bearing step model); e050 I/O contracts for all 8 built-in scripted ops; d25d prompt front-matter closed key set + canonical writer (byte-for-byte body, idempotent, BOM-reject) + read-side schema_version coexistence (PromptVersionError); afe6 reviewer→prompt unification (get_prompt/Prompt, get_reviewer REMOVED, catalog.json → generated reviewers/index.json + CI drift gate); 4b2f execution_mode {single_turn,agentic} enum + runner dispatch (single_turn = one tool-free structured call vs prompt.outputs) + inspector agent-contract surfacing + override-drift flag; c768 validation depth (3-state shallow_contract_check OK/UNKNOWN/ERROR + runtime consumer-input validation, fail-loud + distinct "validation unavailable" on validator failure); 6592 editor typed palette + prompt library + in-UI create/edit + atomic write-back (auto-detect packaged-checkout vs project override) + non-happy paths; 998e in-editor debounced /validate {ok,errors,unavailable} + fail-closed Save + help panel; 4df6 legible canvas (already delivered by pre-epic 2c66b1c7, verified); a83a structured per-field properties panel + raw fallback + editable branch `when`; 3a8f docs (docs/workflow-authoring-v2.md + docs/adr/0001-execution-mode-fixed-on-prompt.md).

INFRA (per user requests): added a CLAUDE.md PR-merge + auto-merge policy; created GitHub ruleset "main-protection" on main (require PR + 11 strict CI status checks, Repository-Admin bypass); CI (test/optionality/eval) now runs on all branches (PR #7).

CODE REVIEW (manually ran the proposed three-pass process from epic 9da1 on PR #8): pass-1 four dimension reviewers → 18 findings; pass-2 re-grounded (citations accurate); pass-3 deterministic gate → no blockers. Fixed 3 confirmed-real defects (C1 None-dimension instruction; C2 duplicate ENGINE_INJECTED_INPUTS vs lint._ENGINE_PROVIDED_VARS; S1/S2 get_prompt path traversal — now rejects ../ ids). Filed + completed 5 follow-up tickets: b642 (shared executor.input_schema_for resolver), 3bb5 (Prompt.is_reviewer derived property), 1acc (backfill agent-step + front-matter-value tests), ae52 (remove shallow_contract_check __getattr__ re-export), 748a (extract editor_contracts.py).

DOGFOODING THE EDITOR DEMO surfaced + fixed a latent bug: step_contract_view didn't register the step library, so a fresh editor process showed every scripted op as contract-less (in-process tests masked it). Fixed + subprocess regression test.

REVIEWER CONTRACT BACKFILL: new permissive reviewer_input schema; all 6 packaged reviewers now declare inputs: reviewer_input + outputs: review_result (completion_verdict for completion_verifier).

LOCAL EDITOR DEMO (gitignored .rebar/): recreated .rebar/workflows/roundtrip-demo.yaml + .rebar/prompts/{review-ticket(agentic, full contract),refine(single_turn),process-child,notify-reviewer}.md in the new front-matter format. Try with: `rebar workflow edit .rebar/workflows/roundtrip-demo.yaml`.

VERIFICATION: full default tier green throughout (latest 3066 passed, 12 skipped); ruff + format clean; module-size gate green (executor.py at 800; lint_refs.py 815 allowlisted); prompt-index drift gate green; browser e2e (Playwright) green.

OPEN DESIGN QUESTION (→ follow-up ticket): contract + prompt text are READ-ONLY in the per-step properties panel by design (contract is derived from op code / prompt front-matter; prompt text is git-canonical, edited via the library/authoring panel — the IR references by id, never inlines). User wants to brainstorm allowing in-editor editing of contract + prompt text.
